button_return_orders: Return to Orders of the Day
confirm_adjourn: Are you sure you want to adjourn the meeting?
tooltip_complete_roll_call_quorum_ready: Quorum is met. You can complete roll call now or continue checking attendance.
tooltip_complete_roll_call_no_quorum: Set a quorum requirement first (see Members drawer)
tooltip_start_count_check: Run a presence count check for current members
tooltip_close_count_check: Close the current count check and apply attendance result
tooltip_approve_minutes: Accept the minutes of the last meeting as correct
tooltip_adopt_agenda: Adopt the proposed agenda as the order of business
tooltip_next_agenda: Move to the next agenda item
tooltip_conclude_agenda: Conclude the last agenda item and proceed to New Business
tooltip_resume_recess: End the break and continue the meeting
tooltip_recognize_motion: Recognize this motion and open it for a second
tooltip_appeal_wait: Wait for appeal window to expire
tooltip_reject_motion: Rule this motion out of order
tooltip_confirm_second: Confirm someone verbally seconded the motion
tooltip_no_second: Declare no one seconded — the motion dies
tooltip_call_vote: End debate and put the motion to a vote
tooltip_call_vote_suspended: Put the matter to a vote
tooltip_recognize_next: Give the floor to the next person in queue
tooltip_original_motion: Propose a new item for the group to consider
tooltip_second_motion: Support putting this motion up for discussion
tooltip_speak_favor: Join the queue to speak in support
tooltip_speak_against: Join the queue to speak in opposition
tooltip_yield_floor: Finish speaking and return the floor to the chair
tooltip_propose_amendment: Change the wording of the motion before voting
tooltip_propose_amendment_disabled: Change the wording of the motion before voting — OUT OF ORDER: {{reason}}
tooltip_pre_chair_withdraw: Take back or revise your motion (no vote needed — chair hasn't accepted yet)
tooltip_point_of_order: Alert the chair that a rule is being broken
tooltip_point_of_order_pending: A point of order is already pending
tooltip_parl_inquiry: Ask the chair a question about procedure
tooltip_request_info: Ask a factual question relevant to the discussion
tooltip_appeal_enabled: Challenge the chair's ruling — the group decides
tooltip_appeal_disabled: No recent chair ruling to appeal
tooltip_division_enabled: Request a counted vote instead of a voice vote
tooltip_division_disabled: Division can only be demanded during voting
tooltip_divide_question_enabled: Split a motion into separate votable parts
tooltip_divide_question_disabled: Only in order when a main motion is pending
tooltip_objection_consideration_enabled: Object to considering the main motion
tooltip_objection_consideration_disabled: Only in order before debate begins on the main motion
tooltip_unlisted_motion: Create an expert-defined motion with custom procedure and precedence
tooltip_suspend_rules: Temporarily set aside the rules (requires 2/3 vote)
tooltip_withdraw_motion: Request to take back your motion (requires consent)
tooltip_orders_of_day: Demand the assembly return to the prescribed order of business
tooltip_postpone_indefinitely: Kill the motion without a direct vote on it
tooltip_amend: Change the wording of the motion before voting
tooltip_commit: Send the motion to a smaller group for study
tooltip_postpone_definitely: Delay the motion to a specific time
tooltip_limit_debate: Set a time limit or speaker limit on debate
tooltip_lay_on_table: Set aside the motion temporarily for urgent business
tooltip_orders_of_day_priv: Require the group to follow the agenda
tooltip_question_privilege: Address an urgent matter affecting the assembly
tooltip_fix_time: Set when the next meeting will be
tooltip_take_from_table: Resume a motion that was set aside earlier
tooltip_reconsider: Reopen a motion that was already voted on
tooltip_rescind: Cancel or reverse a previously adopted motion
higher_priority_pending: A higher or equal priority motion is already pending
